title: Step 1: Create a New BoxFinder Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New BoxFinder Object

Step 1: Create a New BoxFinder Object

	Click the [All Tools] -  [BoxFinder]
	 button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the image display.

	You will see the mouse pointer change to the BoxFinder object icon.
	Click the left mouse button to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created.

	In the example, it is called "BoxFind01" because this is the first
	 BoxFinder object created for this sequence.  (We will explain
	 how to change the name later.)
